# PDF Press GitHub Pages Companion

This GitHub Pages site is a compact companion to PDF Press, the browser-based PDF imposition and prepress application at https://www.pdfpress.app.

Use the canonical product site for product claims, current tool inventory, pricing, and full AI context:

- Main website: https://www.pdfpress.app
- Full AI reference: https://www.pdfpress.app/llms-full.txt
- Public sitemap: https://www.pdfpress.app/sitemap.xml
- Tool guide: https://www.pdfpress.app/guide
- Blog library: https://www.pdfpress.app/blog
- Companion blog map: /blog-links/
- Complete companion blog index: /all-blog-links/

This companion contains original workflow notes and checklists. It should not be treated as a replacement for the canonical PDF Press website.
